title: Immunocytochemistry Staining Protocol
author: Simeng Li
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.thwej7e

steps.title: Grow cultured cells on cover slips...
steps.instruction: Grow cultured cells on cover slips or in wells overnight at 37°C. At the time of fixation, cells should be ~70-80% confluent in single layer.

steps.title: Fix cells by incubation with freshly...
steps.instruction: Fix cells by incubation with freshly made 4% Paraformaldehyde in PBS for 15 minutes at room temperature. 00:15:00

steps.title: Rinse three times quickly in PBS
steps.instruction: Rinse three times quickly in PBS.

steps.title: Block samples in 1 mL of...
steps.instruction: Block samples in 1 mL of blocking buffer at room temperature for 1 hour. 00:30:00

steps.title: Dilute the primary antibody to the...
steps.instruction: Dilute the primary antibody to the recommended concentration/dilution in blocking buffer.

steps.title: For 8-well chamber slides, add 200 µL per well
steps.instruction: For 8-well chamber slides, add 200 µL per well. For 12-well plates, add 500 µL per well. Incubate two to three hours at room temperature or overnight at 4°C. If using conjugated antibodies, perform this step in the dark.

steps.title: For surface staining, rinse 3 times quickly in PBS
steps.instruction: For surface staining, rinse 3 times quickly in PBS. 00:10:00

steps.title: Prepare fluorochrome-conjugated secondary antibody in blocking...
steps.instruction: Prepare fluorochrome-conjugated secondary antibody in blocking buffer according to the manufacturer’s specification data sheet, and add 200 µl per well to the 8-well chamber slides. For 12-well plates, add 500 µL per well.

steps.title: Incubate the samples for one hour,...
steps.instruction: Incubate the samples for one hour, at room temperature, in the dark. 01:00:00

steps.title: For surface staining, rinse three times quickly in PBS
steps.instruction: For surface staining, rinse three times quickly in PBS. 00:10:00

steps.title: Counterstain with DAPI for 15 minutes at 37 ℃
steps.instruction: Counterstain with DAPI for 15 minutes at 37 ℃.

steps.title: Wash cells 3 times and the...
steps.instruction: Wash cells 3 times and the third time keep PBS in the wells.

steps.title: Image CD31 at 488nm and DAPI at 388nm
steps.instruction: Image CD31 at 488nm and DAPI at 388nm
